summary:
POLITICAL ASSASSINATION VISIONS AND PROTECTIVE PRAYERS: Brandon describes a detailed vision involving an assassination attempt on Donald Trump by a sniper during a transition from Air Force One. He states he has been intensely praying for Trump's safety, as well as for the protection of his family members, specifically mentioning Kai, Ivanka, Don Jr., Eric, Barron, and Tiffany. Brandon also shares a separate vision of JD Vance as president, with his pregnant wife Usha, and references a broader conflict he believes is linked to Trump's life and the upcoming 250th anniversary of the United States. Furthermore, he expresses concern about Trump's meeting with Emmanuel Macron at the G7 summit, describing symbolic gifts containing hidden satanic pentagrams.

GEOPOLITICAL ESCALATIONS AND INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS: Brandon outlines his predictions regarding severe global escalations, pointing to tensions involving Iran, Israel, Russia, and Turkey. He envisions Turkey aggressively expanding its military presence in the Black Sea and the eastern Mediterranean, likening the nation's rise to a vampire. Additionally, he claims that Ukrainian President Zelenskyy is attempting to provoke a major war with Europe. Brandon also references prophetic visions concerning Cuba and the Bay of Pigs, describing hidden incriminating evidence, cartels, biological warfare testing, and an impending liberation that will overthrow the current government. He mentions Marco Rubio and Benjamin Netanyahu in the context of these international maneuvers, suggesting Netanyahu is acting independently to secure hidden assets within a mountain.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon shares warnings about cyber attacks targeting vital infrastructure, specifically mentioning water and electricity plants in California facing threats from Iranian hackers, which he believes could cause multi-week outages. He details visions of widespread natural disasters, including a massive earthquake and volcano eruption off the coast of Italy that he claims will result in significant casualties, and a similar seismic event near Portland, Oregon. He connects the appearance of deep-sea fish washing ashore to these impending natural catastrophes. Brandon also asserts that historical churches are being intentionally burned down across France, Canada, and the United States, linking recent fires and riots in New York City to this broader destructive pattern.

EXTRATERRESTRIAL NARRATIVES AND SOCIETAL DISTRACTIONS: Brandon expresses his belief that the public is being intentionally distracted by fabricated alien invasions and UFO sightings, which he categorizes as demonic rather than extraterrestrial. He references a viral White House photo and videos of a mothership orb, suggesting these are deliberate attempts to desensitize the population. According to his perspective, these alien narratives are strategic diversions designed to obscure the implementation of a new financial beast system, the manipulation of cryptocurrency, and the push for the "Clarity Act" legislation.

SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND INTERCESSORY COMMITMENT: Brandon discusses his profound belief in an impending spiritual revival, which he characterizes as the emergence of God's final dream team of believers who will perform unprecedented signs and healings. He emphasizes the critical importance of moving with the glory cloud to find divine provision, urging followers to abandon old religious structures. Through extended readings from a book about Father Nash, Brandon underscores the necessity of consistent, agonizing intercessory prayer, suggesting that deep spiritual groaning and relentless faithfulness are required to sustain this global revival. He concludes by emphasizing the power of communion and spiritual warfare in overcoming sickness and demonic strongholds, maintaining a steadfast focus on an imminent, transformative era for the church.
rawData: [June 15, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/q-M7KOvMzS4]-[Good evening, everybody. Thank you for joining us again today. I'm excited to be here. I've got my sweetheart with me tonight. I told her, 'Come, you've got to come on.' She said, 'I'm doing some things.' I said, 'Well, baby, tonight's the night I need you.' So I'm excited she's here and we're going to get right into it. There's a lot going on, and so I haven't been with you in three days. I've taken the time to seek the Lord. In doing so, I just love my personal—like I said, if I have my time and it's not public, I call it my hermit stage where you can just draw back and just be with Him alone and talk. I don't know, I just love it; there's just nothing like it. And I told her, 'Man, I've got some really good heavy revelations'—I want to call them heavy revelations from the Lord. You know, the impartations and the manifestations of the glory. I'm so excited that Jesus is coming. I get so excited about the soon return of the Lord Jesus and what He's doing in the church right now. When we were with you last broadcast three days ago, I saw to pray for Erica. Erica Kirk, the Lord put it on my heart very strong. I saw an attempt against her life, and the Lord showed me a blond-headed person that was in transition. Could you put a thing on Megan's door, son? Up there. Do you hear her already? Thank you. This person was in transition and had an assignment to hurt Erica Kirk. And I was praying for Erica Kirk in this last video, interceding for her for protection for her family. And this was a spirit behind this individual to kill, steal, and destroy. And then coming against PTSD over her mind, over her body, that she would sleep good at night, that there would be peace over her children, and that there would be a... and I sang that song 'Quiet as a Snowflake in the Night' because the Lord put it as a lullaby. It was the Father's heart. And He said, 'This isn't just concerning Erica Kirk; this is for everybody who is not able to sleep at night praying for peace.' And it was in the middle of the night. It was like 11:00, 12:00, almost 1:00 whenever the Lord showed us that at the very end to pray for her. That was Thursday, right? Yeah, Thursday. So now we fast forward to all that is going on right now, praying over President Trump. Today is his birthday. Today are the no Kings rallies. Praying over New York, praying over all these major assignments. Well, when I heard him announce that he is getting ready to go to the G7 meeting in France, my antenna came up really strong because if we go back to January and what the Lord said about the Prime—and so I hate quoting governments, but I have to in some of this. I saw somebody secret within Russia and somebody in France. That's all I'll say at that because it's easier to do that today. Specifically, they had an assignment to eliminate our president on a building that was 50 yards—I saw a.50 caliber weapon being used way far away, about a mile away. It looked like it was a long, long shot, and it was a.50 caliber weapon. I could see the scope on this thing was massive—a massive scope. I've never seen one in real life. This scope was like a telescopic lens; it's huge on this weapon. And when I saw this, he was laying on top of a roof and he had a black outfit on with a black stocking hat, and it was a white man. I saw this white man and he looked white to me, and he was laying on this rooftop. And I saw President Trump getting off of Air Force One. He was coming out of a building, whatever this was; it was like he was coming down these steps, and as this happened, I saw it hit him—it did what they wanted to do. And the Lord said, 'You must intercede for his life, for there will be an attempt that will try; it will be successful.' He was holding the church accountable for how we pray for him, how we intercede for him to make sure that he makes it across the finish line for great decisions. He was in the valley of decisions concerning Iran and Israel and pride and all these things that the Lord has had us praying for him. I've been interceding for this man, I think more than I've interceded for my own family, to make sure that he makes his mission. To pray for his children, for the attempts upon his children's lives—praying for Ivanka, praying for Don Jr., praying for Eric and Barron and Tiffany and especially Kai. The assignment on Kai—praying for his granddaughter. And you know what I think is very interesting? Ever since he's been president, I see her more around him in special events than I see his kids. She's sitting right next to him. At the Knicks game, she was sitting right there at the golf tournaments. Sitting right there. There are so many times that I have seen this older granddaughter, Kai, with President Trump. And that's what the Lord said: 'Do you see? Do you see this is not just coincidence that I've commissioned you to pray for this young girl for a hedge of protection around and about his granddaughter?' These children are targets, praying for his kids. And so I'm praying for his kids, I pray for his granddaughter. We pray for a widow. We pray for Kai all the time, don't we? Diana and I pray for Kai all the time. And now I've been praying for her mother for cancer that she'll be healed and whole and well. And you know, just praying for the family—just my assignments. God puts you on an assignment and you stick with it until He releases you from it. And then you know when you've accomplished it, you finished the job, right? Because you have a release to go on to something else. But I haven't, to keep praying for President Trump. But Usha in the vision, in this visitation that I saw, I saw her pregnant with child, and she was eight to nine months. So much so that, whenever—you know, ladies, whenever you get to that point of pregnancy where your belly button pokes out because there's no more room—that's what I could see through her clothes, which was interesting because she had a dress on, like a green-looking outfit that looked like it was Hindu. It looked like a green—but I could see her belly was big and I could see her belly button from in there, and she was standing behind a door as she was listening to her husband, JD Vance, who was now president of the United States. And Erica was there. I could see Erica sitting on the couch, and she was talking about losing her husband and how she was trying to console the United States of America for President Trump in this visitation. And I saw seven oak trees that were blackened. I saw the moment this happened that there was a major war that took place because of President Trump's life. And it was a very detailed, very detailed vision. And I knew what happened around the 250th anniversary. The Lord said, 'Pray. This is the attempt time.' Well, he announced yesterday or two days ago, I guess publicly—maybe he's probably announced it all the time; first time I've heard it—'I'm going to France.' And I went, 'Oh no.' For three days—Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday—and he's supposed to have dinner with Emmanuel Macron. Then if you remember, I saw jewels being presented to Trump that looked like emeralds—that were beautiful jewels—to congratulate America on their 250th anniversary. That inside of the jewel was a pentagram. There was satanic symbolism with these gifts that are being given to him from other nations. And there were beautiful jewels. Does anybody remember that? If you follow this channel, do you remember the Lord showing us that, praying about the jewelry? I saw pentagrams in the jewelry. President Trump is going to have Macron host him for dinner at the G7 summit. He leaves tonight or tomorrow after his birthday party at the UFC fight for his 80th birthday. While praying, the Lord said, 'Remember, I saw great distractions. Great distractions are coming. I saw a nation wounded, not a fatal wound, but a wound that would bring the bride to the side.' Trump heads to the G7 summit in France after reaching a deal to end the war with Iran. Does the deal stick? Is this the reprieve that brings forth Ezekiel 38 and 39? I saw a reprieve, a pause with a blow-for-blow, a season like a pause as they lick their wounds. As they were getting ready for Ezekiel 38 and 39, I saw Turkey beating their war drums. The focus started to shift towards Turkey and Syria. In the days ahead, I saw plans with Russia and Turkey talking to take over the Black Sea for a major escalation of war because of what Europe is doing. I saw a web that was black, with a black widow that went from place to place, representing Zelenskyy trying to provoke a major war with Europe. Turkey is considering large naval exercises in the eastern Mediterranean, sending a strong message to Israel and Greece. Turkey will rise up like a vampire in the days ahead. I saw him with a vampire-looking cloak on, and he was furious. I saw them coming to the aid of the Syrians. Putin said many enemies under Napoleon were not just from France; it was the entirety of Europe. With Hitler, it was the same thing. Look at what happened during the Battle of Stalingrad. Some even entered NATO to make sure they get a slice of the pie. We are a single people, but we are united in our multitude, and we must be a step ahead. I saw in the spirit a Hitler swastika coming up out of Germany again with sacrifices to that Molok. It was a demon; it's Molok. I saw a darkness coming over Europe, over England, with Big Ben turning into a moon. I saw churches burning and a major shaking to awaken; a major revival is coming. Turkey is fixing to do all this. Russia is having major gas lines after Ukraine struck their oil. They are lining up to get gas because they're out of gas in Russia. When I told you our water infrastructure was a target, the Lord said to pray specifically for water plants against cyber attacks. I saw attacks against our substations; some cities would be without electricity for up to three weeks. The California water system was hit by Iranian hackers, a terrifying threat to drinking supplies. Pray for Princess Kate concerning her health, her stomach area, and her uterus. I saw something very serious. Pray for George. I saw an assignment for him to be groomed for something dark with witchcraft, becoming part of the Antichrist system. He's only 12, but I saw him at 17 or 18, and his voice would become louder than his father's. Trump thinks Putin told him he was the first foreign leader to call him today for his birthday. I saw him siding with Russia more than with Ukraine and Europe. I'm curious what the G7 will be like with Macron because I said Macron is the Ishmael to the Isaac. Everyone's going to think Macron is the Antichrist, but he is the Ishmael to the real one. When Steven Spielberg comes out with his movie, you're going to see a lot of alien stuff in the news. They're going to start to tell you about all these false demonic alien invasions. This is what Jesus told me when I was on the side of heaven with him. He told me, "This is one of the major signs that I want you to watch." This was 2014. They'll talk about aliens a lot before my return. There'll be an alien visitation, a false one, a demonic spirit. You entertain angels unawares, but you entertain demonic spirits unaware. Now they have released this photo. I don't know if this is AI, Photoshop, or some kind of weirdness. They pulled it down. It had over a hundred million hits. The original got shared over 17,000 times in a matter of just an hour or something; it went viral, and they pulled the photo—the White House did. This is weird. They're all trying to make excuses. What is this? Well, it feels dark. Regardless if it's Photoshop or fake or whatever, the White House is playing around if they are. But it was out of the White House when they posted this photo. I don't know what these people are; this is not lizard people. These are demonic-looking people, like those from Lord of the Rings. But interesting, huh? I thought, you know, this is what I told you: a great distraction. Watch as you see the Clarity Act push. They'll push the Clarity Act in the days ahead. There'll be a distraction over here as they're working over here. I saw manipulation with crypto as they get ready to install the beast system in the days ahead. A Clarity Act will come to make a line that's like a black line, as black as this microphone, which will be black like onyx. I saw a distraction with all this alien stuff around the 14th. It's the week of the 14th; this is happening right now, just like the Lord said. That's spot on. He said, "Watch this. It will happen." This happened on the 13th, yesterday. Is that correct? Yes. So the 13th, 14th, and today—all this is being released. They're talking about this alien stuff, and this is what the Lord was saying: distractions. Watch the 14th. Then he announced, "I'm leaving to go to the G7 on the 14th into the 15th." This is the timeframe when the Lord said to pray for his life. Then I thought this was interesting. In the word, do you have the word about seeing fish from the deep? No, I don't. I didn't have that photo. I can get the photo real quick. Now, there are a lot of people that say this was old. I have not seen this before, so if it is old, forgive us. But what was that, babe? the comments? Oh, they're trying to say that he was a Red. Oh my goodness. No, I think that's that girl that betrayed him in the Republican party. We'll see fish that we've never seen before come up and start showing up on the shore. I saw a major volcano going off in the water in Italy in this area. I'm talking a major volcano going off, and 300,000 people perish when it happens on the coastline of Italy. But the Lord said signs that are getting ready to happen are when these fish—the doomsday fish, these fish that have never been seen before—start washing up on the shore. I thought this was interesting because Braden said, "Dad, you remember you gave that word about the fish washing up that we've never seen before? I've never seen this fish." That thing looks like some kind of demon; it's dark-looking, has black teeth—it's spooky. But it's on the shore, and so people are asking about it. They said, "Have we not seen that a year ago, two years ago?" I don't know. All I know is we saw it today and it was a fresh post. Whether or not somebody's recirculating it, I don't know. Sometimes people do; they recirculate stuff. But isn't that interesting? Because the Lord told us to start watching for these things coming up out of the deep water. Concerning Portland, Oregon: I saw right off the coast in the Pacific Ocean a major volcano, a major earthquake going off in the ocean out by the Oregon coastline. I saw whales dying. I saw major populations of fish all washing up on the shore in the days ahead. Major disruption of fish. And the Lord told us to pray about fires. Where are these fires? Somebody said there's a church on fire. Okay, so they're burning the churches in France. They don't know what happened, but they said the church completely caught fire. We know what happened. I said they're going to burn the churches in the days ahead. I said they're going to burn them in Europe, they're going to burn them in Canada, specifically Toronto, and they're going to burn them in America. They're going to poke the church, and you're going to see old historic buildings burning—old churches that are a thousand years old burning down to the ground. It would be symbolic of revival coming. But I saw the church getting very upset, and it was the Muslim Brotherhood burning these churches. So a church is burning. How many are burnt now? This was last night in France. This is what the Lord showed us was coming. So I warned you what the Lord said, and there's going to be a lot of them, especially in Toronto. They're going to burn a lot of churches in Toronto. Then these people are acting nuts, burning stuff in New York City last night—school buses. Why are the school buses there? Why are people acting nuts? Because the New York Knicks won the basketball game after 50 years. I don't think they burned anything, but I remember seeing fires in New York. I said I see things on fire in New York, and I saw more fires than that. So we'll continue to pray for New York because I saw a lot of fires. One fire is not what I saw; one burning is not what I saw. I saw a lot of fires. I saw major buildings burning in New York, and people were rioting. So if we stopped it, great, but I still feel in my spirit there's something coming. Definitely, the Lord said, "Brandon, that is not what you saw. Not this. There is more coming for New York City." Praying for New York. I hear that by the Spirit of God right then as I was talking. The Lord said, "That's not it, Brandon." So we're here, we're transparent. Look, a volcano is going off in Mexico last night. That's neat. But what is that? More meteors in the sky in Mexico. Did you see the UFO files with the orb, the big one, and all the other ones? Benny Johnson had it on his channel. Did you see that? No, I'm just saying because we released it and Benny Johnson took it. There was a red orb, and it was huge—it was a mothership—and all these other little orbs started coming out of it. Did anybody see that? I thought that was pretty spooky. I said, "Wow, they got it all on video." And I said that the Lord said they would release the evidence a little at a time, and then they're going to give you the motherlode. The last file is the motherlode. It's the one that's going to be a shock and awe to the nations, but they're releasing things a little at a time. It's like they are desensitizing you. Right here: deep earthquake to strike Italy and a massive volcano system. I said, "Watch this, it just happened." But it was in a cove where I saw all the devastation with the tsunami wave. It was a tsunami wave that wiped the people out, and 300,000 people went home. So we try to update you on the news. I hadn't been with you in three days. I hope it flowed pretty good. Did you get anything else, Braden? Yeah, I think that's it. Are you sure? So, we're going to pray for President Trump right now. We're going to pray for his safe travels, and we're going to pray over the 250th anniversary. There are so many things, and we'll just see where the Holy Spirit leads us tonight. I hope you got the news update. Braden likes to do the news; we love doing the news. Isn't it fun? It shows you where we are in the signs of the times and how close we are to the coming of the Lord. I was focusing on Numbers today, whenever the Lord... when the cloud moved over the children of Israel. As it moved, you needed to move with it. If the children of Israel would have stayed, they wouldn't have had the blessing. Provision is always there when you're attached to where He's at. Fruit is always bountiful whenever you're attached to Him. There is no lack; there is no lack of abundance. The Lord said, 'Where I am, the treasure is.' Where the anointing flows, where the anointing goes, where that covering goes, the blessing was there to take care of My people. Read—you know what, baby? Read that. Let's look at it. Do I have it there? Let's take a pause right here and look at that. Where's my history on that? It was Numbers. Yeah, read it. Can you read it loud? The passage? No, just the scripture. Yeah, Numbers 9:17-23: 'And wherever and whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, after that the children of Israel journeyed; and in the place where the cloud abode, there the children of Israel pitched their tents. At the commandment of the Lord the children of Israel journeyed, and at the commandment of the Lord they pitched. As long as the cloud abode upon the tabernacle they rested in their tents. And when the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle many days, then the children of Israel kept the charge of the Lord and journeyed not. And so it was, when the cloud abode from even unto the morning, and that the cloud was taken up in the morning, then they journeyed; whether it were two days, or a month, or a year, that the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle, the children of Israel abode in their tents, and journeyed not: but when it was taken up, they journeyed. At the commandment of the Lord they rested in the tents, and at the commandment of the Lord they journeyed.' You always stay where He's at. And where He's at, there's blessing. That's what the Lord was showing me today. I prayed a lot about this today, and He was showing me where the cloud is. It may not feel like it was where it was before—where your assignment changes, where God has you changes the direction of ministry. No matter if your flesh feels good about it or not, go where the cloud is. And where the cloud is, the provision is. God will always abundantly supply for that season when you're underneath that cloud. He said, 'There is no lack in Me. There is a lack of boldness.' You'll see; He told me that very strongly. He said, 'Brenda, there'll be no lack in this end-time move.' As I've been praying these last three days, He said, 'I'm putting in My dream team.' He said, 'Do you remember the Olympics when Michael Jordan, Scottie Pippen, and Larry Bird—the best dream team ever? They try to make a dream team now, but nobody compares to the original dream team back in the '90s when Michael Jordan and the others were whipping up on the nations. It was amazing. I'm a basketball fan; I love basketball. But I'm going to tell you, there was no dream team like that dream team. I mean, even with King James and what we have now with Stephen Curry, it's a joke compared to the last dream team in my opinion. The Lord said William Branham, Jack Coe, Oral Roberts, and Kathryn Kuhlman were my '40s dream team. There was a dream team for that generation. But I'm raising up My final generation, My dream team of this generation.' And there are certain people that you're about to see, Brandon, if you'll just say yes—that the glory of God will radiate out of you like Moses. Your face will shine like Moses's did with the glory of the Lord. He said, 'But you will have to be more dead to self than ever—dead to self so much so that it is a burning sacrifice that comes up before My altar. I will share My glory with no one.' He kept telling me this week, 'But I'm putting in My dream team, the finals. This is it—the last hurrah, the fireworks show, the great finale, the dream team.' And you're about to see signs and wonders. I told you I saw Jesus and those chariots of fire with presents and mantles that we've never seen before were on those chariots of fire. When I went to heaven, I could see the silos full of body parts: black arms, white arms, black noses, green eyes, brown eyes, blue eyes, black eyes—all kinds of different colored eyes, all kinds of different colored skin in silos. The body parts were all in these silos for creative miracles, creative signs and wonders. And I saw things in these silos that people have been believing for, and I saw the silos being emptied. He said, 'There's no reason for them to be full up here, son, because you don't need them when you come up here. I'm releasing the silos for this last outpouring.' I saw a glorious wave of the glory of God that was coming, and I saw mantles of people. Everybody's always trying to say, 'Well, I want Oral Roberts's mantle back from when he was alive.' No, God's not a cookie-cutter. You were fearfully and wonderfully made. You don't need Brother So-and-So's mantle; you have what God's put on you. You don't need Kenneth Hagin's mantle or Kathryn Kuhlman's mantle. People wonder, 'Well, I wonder who got her mantle? Was it Benny Hinn or whoever?' Billy Burke, or whoever is there—I can tell you they might operate similarly, but I can assure you Billy Burke is Billy Burke. I'm personal friends with Billy Burke, and I'm telling you, the man walks in a healing mantle that is amazing. Yes, it's similar to Kathryn Kuhlman's—similar, I'm going to say that—but he is fearfully and wonderfully made by himself, and it's beautiful to talk to him on the phone. There are people who carry prayer mantles; there are people who carry things. When the Lord talked to me about Jeannie Wilkerson and the impartations people receive, He said this is something that we've never seen before. We cannot camp around old wineskins, for God is about to do something we've never seen before. As I saw those chariots of fire delivering those packages, He reminded me of it. He said, 'Do you remember December 25th, whenever you were giving your gifts to your kids? I was giving My gifts to Mine.' Not all of those chariots of fire were able to deliver those gifts because the people weren't ready for them and they refused to take them. I saw the chariot of fire turn back around and go back into heaven with that package on the back because they wouldn't take the gift. Freely we've been given; freely we give it out. God is not a man; He's not a God that forces you to do anything. He's a gentleman. The Lord showed me these gifts and callings of new mantles, like it was with William Seymour. They were the original; they were the dream team of that generation. But God said, 'I'm bringing My dream team of this generation,' with signs and wonders and mantles that have never been seen before, just like it was when Kathryn Kuhlman walked on the scene. Nobody had seen that before. Nobody saw a woman wear a white dress like that and flow around, and the Holy Spirit and do all that she did. Nobody had seen that before. She was original; she wasn't an echo. And the Lord said, "I'm raising up not echoes, Brandon. I'm raising up new voices that will take the baton from the elders, the elder generation, and march on, soldier, onward Christian soldier." He said, "Do you understand what I'm trying to tell you all? Stop looking to the past and look to what's coming, what God has for you to do. You're a closer. You're built for pressure. God saved the best for last. We will be the generation that does not taste death, but we move with the cloud. Where is God calling you to be? Don't camp around what you used to do and what you used to think you were. Find out God's word for the now, the word for today, and go to the place called there. For when the provision dries up and the Riverbrook dries up and the raven stops coming and giving you the food, you have to go to the place called there. Where is the provision that God has for your ministry? And where is what God has for you today? Because God is a God of abundant supply and there is no lack in Him. If you're a giver and you're a sower," He said, "I'll provide 30, 60, and 100-fold." Either you believe it or you don't. But if there's no bountiful supply, He said, "You got to go to the Word to where I said go to the place called there, Brandon. Go and travel with the glory. For where there's glory, there's abundance." The manna always showed up every morning for the kids. He always took care of His kids. And if He took care of them in the Old Testament, how much more will He take care of you in the New. That's what He said to me. But you have to be where the glory cloud's at. For where the glory cloud's at, that's where His abundant supply is. And He said, "A lot of people are not in that place, and that's why they're struggling." And He said, "Break off the things of the old and what you used to know." And He said, "Brandon, I'm going. It might be time to trim some fat. Trim some fat." He said, "Just because it worked back then doesn't mean it's for today. And as the glory intensifies, I'll bring more supply." And I got so stirred up inside about this, about my own ministry and about what He's saying about me. He said, "I'm the God of more than enough. The provision's always there. The gold coin was in the fish's mouth, son. They never lacked anything. Even my disciples, I took care of them always. Go to the place called there, Brandon. Always be at the place called there. You can sit by the Riverbrook and worry about why it dried up and look at the river as it flows and go, 'What? It all went away.' The raven doesn't come anymore because you got to go to the widow and I'll take care of you there. I'll get the cake and the little oil, and abundant supply came on it. The moment he blessed it and she sowed the seed, the abundant supply came to pay off our debts. The abundant supply came that they had more than enough. They didn't starve and die. He had more than enough. Go and sell all this. Look what I did. Boom. Find every pot, every vessel, everything, and I'm going to fill it to the top, to the overflow, to the point where she was going and borrowing vessels. The man of God is here. The Prophet of God is here, and where the place of 'there' is and where the place of provision is, God always provides. And that's what He showed me today. And He said, "Watch where I had the children of Israel. If they would have stayed back where the shadow and the glory was not, He said the supply wouldn't have been there. The manna would have dried up. But I told them to move. I told them to do these things. Even when their flesh didn't want to do it, I had them always on the move. And a whole generation had to die off, Brandon, before they realized that I had blessed them to take the land.
